title: Fix admin login visibility, post-login redirects, and admin-only navbar links

requirements.text: On the LoginPage, ensure the admin login option/button/tab is clearly visible and accessible to users without requiring any special steps. Both 'User Login' and 'Admin Login' modes must be visually distinguishable and immediately available on page load.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /login shows both user and admin login options without any extra interaction
The admin login toggle/tab/button is rendered in the DOM and not hidden by CSS or conditional logic on initial load
Switching between user and admin login modes works correctly

requirements.text: After a successful admin login via Internet Identity and OTP verification, the user must be automatically redirected to the admin dashboard (/admin/dashboard). After a successful regular user login, the user must be redirected to the user dashboard or registration page as appropriate.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin login flow ends with a redirect to /admin/dashboard
New user login redirects to /register if no profile exists
No redirect loops or stalls occur after login

requirements.text: In the Navbar, admin-only navigation links (e.g., links to admin dashboard, document review, death verification, legal verification, controlled access release) must only appear when the authenticated user is confirmed to be an admin. They must not appear for guests or regular authenticated users.
acceptanceCriteria: Unauthenticated (guest) users see no admin links in the Navbar
Regular authenticated (non-admin) users see no admin links in the Navbar
Authenticated admin users see admin-specific navigation links in the Navbar
Admin link visibility updates correctly upon login and logout

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
All fixes must use the existing React Query, TanStack Router, and Internet Identity patterns already in the codebase
nonGoals: Adding new admin features or pages
Redesigning the visual theme or layout
